Quick summary from `helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`:
- Compound: NXB-7042
- Indication: Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)
- Last updated: 2026-03-28

Dosing summary:
- CU-001: 12.4 kg, 0.15 mg/kg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-14, PK clearance 3.2 mL/min, calculated dose 1.86 mg
- CU-002: 9.1 kg, 0.12 mg/kg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-12, PK clearance 2.8 mL/min, calculated dose 1.09 mg
- CU-003: 15.7 kg, 0.18 mg/kg, q2w, next dose 2026-04-10, PK clearance 4.1 mL/min, calculated dose 2.83 mg

Clinical notes:
- CU-001: Stable; tumor regression 22% at last scan
- CU-002: Responding well; weight gain improving
- CU-003: New enrollment; first dose administered 2026-03-27

On PK model stability:
- From the dosing config alone, nothing looks obviously inconsistent.
- But I can’t confirm live PK model stability just from that file.
- I’ve already pulled the monitoring config so I can check whether the configured monitoring/thresholds look normal, but I’d still need actual runtime metrics or logs to say the models are definitively stable.

If you want, I can next give you a one-line clinician-facing version for forwarding to Dr. Martinez.
